_comment: Sample Engine Usage payload. Regenerate from your own environment with scripts/usage_bridge/usage_bridge_reader.py. Every block carries an explicit source + confidence label; a CLI that exposes no quota percent reports real token counts instead of a fabricated percent.

agy.note: agy runs Gemini and Claude/GPT-OSS on separate quota pools; each is reported independently.

claude.note: real tokens from logged tasks (rolling 7d); the Claude CLI exposes no quota percent, so no percent is shown - wire OTel for a real %
